#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_endsieg = {
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (5 techs) ──

# early_naval_bomber
#   year=1917 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# interwars_naval_bomber
#   year=1924 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_endsieg = {
    # early_naval_bomber — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_naval_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_naval_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwars_naval_bomber — 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwars_naval_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1924 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = interwars_naval_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_endsieg = {
    # iw_large_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_technology = basic_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # strategic_bomber2 — 1940

            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers

    # improved_large_airframe — 1940

            NOT = { has_technology = improved_large_airframe }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }

            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_technology = miniature_fighters
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }

            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }

            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (12 techs) ──

# ww1_early_bomber
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ww1_early_bomber
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1928 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ww1_early_bomber — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ww1_early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_bomber }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1916 }

            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = basic_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = early_basic_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = early_basic_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_bomber — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = improved_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_improved_bomber — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_improved_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = early_improved_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_bomber — 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_endsieg = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_b]

# future_computing_machine_4
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_c]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_endsieg = {
    # census_tabulating — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = census_tabulating }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = census_tabulating
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # automatic_feed_tab — 1911
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = automatic_feed_tab }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1911 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = automatic_feed_tab
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cipher_machine — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cipher_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = cipher_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1923
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1923 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # teleprinter — 1923
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = teleprinter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1923 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = teleprinter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # accounting_machine — 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = accounting_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1928 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        add_technology = advanced_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_computing_machine_2 — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_computing_machine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_computing_machine_3 — 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_computing_machine_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            has_technology = streamlined_line_b
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_computing_machine_4 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_computing_machine_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            has_technology = streamlined_line_c
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / INDUSTRY (100 techs) ──

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_endsieg = {
    # bunker — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bunker }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = bunker
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_machine_tools — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_machine_tools }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = early_machine_tools
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # trench_warfare — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = trench_warfare }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = trench_warfare
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # construction1 — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = construction1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = construction1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_early_machine_tools — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_early_machine_tools }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

        add_technology = improved_early_machine_tools

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = construction11
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (9 techs) ──

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuke_naval
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes_2
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_endsieg = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuke_naval — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuke_naval }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuke_naval
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes_2 — 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes_3 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (12 techs) ──

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# decimetric_radar
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decimetric_radar
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_centimetric_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_centimetric_radar
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_2
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_3
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_endsieg = {
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # decimetric_radar — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = decimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = decimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_decimetric_radar — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_decimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = improved_decimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_centimetric_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = improved_centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_centimetric_radar — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = advanced_centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar_2 — 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_radar_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_radar_3 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_radar_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = future_radar_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (23 techs) ──

# rocket_artillery

# rocket_artillery2

#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_b
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets

#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1957 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuke_rocket_engines
#   year=1959 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_endsieg = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_engines — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber

    # rocket_artillery_a — 1945

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets

    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 — 1946

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # rocket_artillery_b — 1946

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines — 1946
    if = {

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets

            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_rocket_engines — 1957
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1957 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = modern_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuke_rocket_engines — 1959
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuke_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1959 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuke_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_TANK (14 techs) ──

# early_antitank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_endsieg = {
    # early_antitank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = early_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_a — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_b — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_c — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_c
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_d — 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_e — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_endsieg = {
    # horse_artillery — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = horse_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = horse_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # horse_artillery2 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = horse_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = horse_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_railway_gun — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = early_railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_artillery_1 — 1912

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # howitzer8 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = howitzer8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = howitzer8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 1940

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (15 techs) ──

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_b
#   year=1951 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_endsieg = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }

    # super_heavy_tank_b — 1951

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
